import requests
from typing import List, Dict, Any

def fetch_all_products(product_ids: List[str]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
    results = []
    for pid in product_ids:
        session = requests.Session()
        response = session.get(f"https://api.example.com/products/{pid}", timeout=10)
        results.append(response.json())
    return results

def process_orders(order_ids: List[str]) -> List[dict]:
    processed = []
    for oid in order_ids:
        client = _create_db_client()
        order = client.query(f"SELECT * FROM orders WHERE id = '{oid}'")
        processed.append(order)
    return processed

def _create_db_client():
    import psycopg2
    return psycopg2.connect("dbname=mydb")

def send_notifications(users: List[dict], message: str) -> None:
    for user in users:
        smtp = smtplib.SMTP("smtp.example.com", 587)
        smtp.sendmail("app@example.com", user["email"], message)
        smtp.quit()
